name: blackswan-vscode
description: Stress-test mathematical and financial logic in Python code. Finds the exact line where your model breaks under extreme conditions.

blackswan.pythonPath.description: Path to the Python executable used to run the BlackSwan engine. Leave empty to use the Python extension's interpreter or the system default.

enumDescriptions: Fast mode: skips Slow-Path attribution replay. Runs faster but confidence is marked 'unverified'.
Full mode: runs the Two-Path engine with attribution replay. Slower but all findings have verified confidence levels.
blackswan.mode.description: Execution mode for the BlackSwan engine. 'fast' is recommended for interactive use; 'full' for final audits.

blackswan.maxRuntimeSec.markdownDescription: Hard time limit in seconds. The engine stops after this many seconds even if not all iterations have completed. Leave empty for no limit.

blackswan.geminiModel.markdownDescription: Gemini model used for AI failure explanations. Defaults to `gemini-2.0-flash` (free tier, 15 RPM). Run `BlackSwan: Set Gemini API Key` to configure your key.
